ADVISING

All majors are strongly encouraged to see an advisor at least once each semester. Advising is available by appointment in the Camille Kendall Academic Center (Building III), room 5105. Students must complete

1

39

2 Criminology and Criminal Justice Major at Shady Grove

all course prerequisites and obtain department permission from the Program Director to enroll in most CCJS classes. Call 301-738-6307 or email ccjsusg@umd.edu.
